title: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked

seo.title: How to Make Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — Easy American Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked. This easy American recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

seo.imageAlt: Authentic American Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — a beloved American classic

description: This classic Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked recipe delivers ultimate comfort in every bite, featuring tender pasta coated in a rich, creamy cheese sauce. Baked to golden perfection with a crispy topping, it is the quintessential American family favorite. Perfect for a cozy dinner or a crowd-pleasing side dish, this recipe brings warmth and joy to any table.

instructions.title: Prepare Pasta and Oven
instructions.text: Cook the elbow macaroni according to package directions until al dente. Drain well and set aside. While the pasta cooks, preheat your oven to 375F (190C) and lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.

instructions.title: Make the Roux
instructions.text: In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, melt 1/2 cup of unsalted butter over medium heat. Once melted, whisk in the all-purpose flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until a smooth paste forms and smells slightly nutty. This is your roux.

instructions.title: Create Béchamel Sauce
instructions.text: Gradually whisk in the warmed whole milk, a little at a time, ensuring no lumps form. Continue to whisk until the sauce thickens to a creamy consistency, about 5-7 minutes. Do not boil vigorously; just let it gently simmer and thicken.

instructions.title: Form Cheese Sauce
instructions.text: Remove the pan from the heat. Stir in 3 cups of shredded sharp cheddar cheese and all of the shredded Monterey Jack cheese until thoroughly melted and smooth. Season the cheese sauce with salt, freshly ground black pepper, and dry mustard powder. Add smoked paprika if you desire a hint of smoky flavor.

instructions.title: Combine and Assemble
instructions.text: Add the cooked and drained macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir gently until all the pasta is evenly coated and swimming in creamy goodness. Pour the entire mixture into the prepared 9x13 inch baking dish, spreading it evenly.

instructions.title: Add Topping
instructions.text: In a small bowl, toss the panko breadcrumbs with the 2 tablespoons of melted butter until evenly coated. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of shredded sharp cheddar cheese evenly over the macaroni in the baking dish, then top with the buttered panko breadcrumbs for a delightful crunch.

instructions.title: Bake to Perfection
instructions.text: Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the mac and cheese is bubbly around the edges and the topping is golden brown and delightfully crispy. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes before serving to allow the sauce to set slightly, making it easier to serve.

tips: For the ultimate creamy texture, use freshly shredded cheese instead of pre-shredded, as it melts smoother and prevents a grainy sauce.
Do not overcook the pasta initially; it should be al dente, as it will continue to cook in the oven and absorb the delicious cheese sauce.
A combination of cheeses like sharp cheddar, Gruyere, and Monterey Jack will add depth and complexity to your mac and cheese sauce.
article: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked is a beloved American Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
